task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.
The '#release-updates' channel is highlighted in the sidebar and its message history is visible in the main chat area.

task_completion.description: Initiate a discussion from the most recent release announcement message
task_completion.visual_evidence: The discussion creation sidebar/modal is open, and it shows that it is replying to or linked to a specific release announcement message from the channel.

task_completion.description: Name the new discussion 'Upgrade Planning Discussion'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Upgrade Planning Discussion' is visible in the discussion name field during creation, or in the header of the newly created discussion panel.

task_completion.description: Post the required initial message in the discussion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact message 'Team, let's discuss whether we should upgrade to this release. Please share your thoughts on compatibility and timeline.' is visible as a sent message inside the 'Upgrade Planning Discussion' thread/panel.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web or desktop application being interacted with, rather than terminal windows executing API/curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard Rocket.Chat elements (sidebar, message input, discussion panel) and is not a text editor or a mock application.

integrity.description: The discussion was created from a message, not as a standalone channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The discussion panel shows a parent message (the release announcement) at the top or indicates it is a thread/discussion belonging to a specific message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel: 'release-updates'. Discussion name: 'Upgrade Planning Discussion'. Initial message text: 'Team, let's discuss whether we should upgrade to this release. Please share your thoughts on compatibility and timeline.'
